description.overview: Named for their cotton-like coat and the port city of Tulear, these charming dogs are known for their clownish personality and love of their families.
description.history: The Coton de Tulear originated in Madagascar.
description.temperament: Known for being happy, playful, affectionate.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, cotton-like, fluffy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Named for their cotton-like coat and the port city of Tulear, these charming dogs are known for their clownish personality and love of their families.
